series_metadata.series_description: Summary reports from local law enforcement for criminal gang activity fines. Reports list the use and disposition of all fine moneys, record of receipts, general types of expenditures, and the specific amount of each general type of expenditure. Reporting requirements are outlined in ORC 2923.42 (C)(2)(b).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: or scanned/data entry, whichever is earlier ; Electronic
